questions.question: 飛 行員如何得知LORAN-C接收器可以操作儀器飛行?
questions.A: 參閱飛機飛行手冊補充章節.
questions.B: 機上有一狀態卡標示"LORAN-C可於儀器飛行時航 路,終端與進場使用".
questions.C: 登記於機體時間記錄本上;LORAN-C接收器每30天需做一次檢 查.
questions.question_en: H ow may a pilot determine if a LORAN-C receiver is authorized for IFR operations?
questions.A_en: consult the AIRPLANE FIGHT MANUAL SUPPLEMENT.
questions.B_en: a placard stating, "LORAN-C APPROVED FOR IFR EN ROUTE, TERMINAL AND APPROACH SEGMENTS" .
questions.C_en: an airframe logbook entry that the LORAN-C receiver has been checked within the previous 30 calendar days.

questions.question_en: L ORAN-C is based upon measurements of the difference in time arrival of pulses generated by what type of radio station?
questions.A_en: a group of stations operating on the 108-115 MHz frequency band.
questions.B_en: two stations operating on the 90-110 MHz frequency band.
questions.C_en: a chain of stations operating on the 90-110 kHz frequency band.

questions.B_en: It is more reliable than vacuum-driven indicators.
questions.C_en: It will not tumble as will vacuum-driven turn indicators.
